entry.title: Re: What happens with SDI virtual tables and remote sourc...
entry.content:
Hi Sascha,

DP agent is used to connect to MSSQL, in this case, if DP agent is down, then no access to the table content, there is no cache. 

The only impact is the datasource that use SDI connection, so during the downtime, if you have batch loading, it will fail(so if you have planned downtime or upgrade, do not run any batch loading),  if you have realtime replication(subscription), you can suspend the remote source before planned downtime.
https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SMART_DATA_INTEGRATION/7952ef28a6914997abc01745fef1b607/782844c3cc8e4fcc89c78ffe83e03eb7.html

use sql command to do remote source suspend capture and suspend distribute, after restart of DP agent, resume capture and distribute. Thanks.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Re: In-app purchases
entry.content: Is there any way to incorperate in-app purchases @EsmeeX @MaiaraEllwanger  ?

entry.title: Re: Getting error while inserting in Internal Order table...
entry.content:
Hi Ashish,

If the test through BAPI call can finish successfully, then possible the case is the parameter pass through virtual procedure is not exactly the same as used in BAPI call directly in ERP system.  You can double confirm this.

Best regards
Helen

entry.title: Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations Ownership
entry.content:
Team,
Please let me know which SAP Functional Team [ SAP HCM etc...] or SAP Technical Team should be ROLE OWNER [ Role assignment approver or Role Content Approver] for Customer/Vendor Integration Conversion Process Authorizations. Also, please share location of relevant documentation - if available. 

Thanks

Raj

entry.title: Re: FMs or BAPIs shall be used to update the PIRs i.e. MD62
entry.content:
PLANBEDARF_UPDATE is an update task FM; using this FM in customer code is bad practice (these FMs mainly execute the final SQL Abap statements that update the database, but ignore most, if not all, checks and dependencies).

It is better to look for a BAPI similar to BAPI_REQUIREMENTS_CHANGE in the BUS3027 Planned Independent Requirement business object.

entry.title: Adding hyperlinks into a comment in Signavio Collaboration Hub and/or Process Manager?
entry.content:
Hello all,

is there are way to add a clickable hyperlink in a comment in Signavio Collaboration Hub and/or Process Manager?
I tried to add a link with a HTML code like this, but it does not work: 

<a href="https://de.wikipedia.org" target="_blank">https://de.wikipedia.org</a>

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM, tenant extension
entry.content:
Hello,

more news in my latest blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-cloud-alm-tenant-extension-now-available-on-the-sap-price-list/ba-p/13860640

Nicolas

entry.title: Re: CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives...
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

Thanks for sharing this, I already tried this approach of using  CURR_TO_DECFLOAT_AMOUNT, but then I get annoying error :

 

Also, I tried another apporach by casting DMBTR as Dec(23,2), that finally worked:

However, now I have another problem. I want to do the same for another amount field WRBTR, and i want to use the same 'calculatedUnit' for this fields as well. but then it cries that the 'calculatedUnit' can be used only once (see below). This is illogical in my opinion as why would the system not allow to use a unit as reference for multiple fields?

That means, for each Amount field calculation, I need a separate calculatedUnit (having the same or different value).

(honestly I don't understand why we even need this calculatedUnit and can't use the CURR reference instead, as the calculated value (dmbtr_per_menge) is an amount and not a quantity)

Just to emphasis the challange here, my real use case it to convert atleast 15 cost fields from KEPH table (say KST001...KST015 ) to get per unit cost for materials in business report. So with this approach, I need to create 15 'calculatedUnit' fields in the CDS having the same value (say EUR / KG).

This is not CLEAN ABAP in my opinion, and I am still looking for a better and simpler way of achieving this.

Regards,

Bharat Bajaj

entry.title: Re: How to migrate business data from legacy to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private
entry.content: Thanks and regards, have a nice day. 🙂

entry.title: Re: Task Center not attributing tasks correctly
entry.content: Hi, please check step 4 in this tutorial, maybe it will help https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/learn-how-to-configure-sap-build-process-automation-tasks-for-sap-task/ba-p/13576849

entry.title: HANA Tenant Copy Procedure - An Alternative To HSR
entry.content:
Hello All,

This blog will explain you details on how to copy HANA database using tenant copy procedure.

It can be helpful in various scenario's like

  • Database Homogenous Migration.
  • Refreshing Database.
  • Creating New system from existing one.

It follow similar mechanism as that of HANA Database Replication.

Prerequisite's for doing HANA tenant copy.

  • Verify TLS/SSL Configuration of Internal Communication Channels (Optional)
  • Set Up Trust Relationship Between Target and Source Systems (Optional)
  • Open Communication From Target to Source System (Mandatory)
  • Create Credential for Authenticated Access to Source System (Mandatory)

Unlike HSR we don't need OS access for doing tenant copy. we need SYSTEM user credentials for both target and source HANA database.

In our scenario, we did our HEC to RISE migration using HANA tenant copy. So this blog will be more focused on usage of Tenant copy in Database Migration.

Setting up parameters in source system

we need to set below parameters in source system. It might be possible that these are already set on the database so please verify the same.

In our case we did not had SSL communication and trust setup between source and target hence we are disabling SSL.

 

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('multidb', 'enforce_ssl_database_replication') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication_communication', 'enable_ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'listeninterface') = '.global' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '1073741824' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_timeout') = '30' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('persistence', 'log_mode') = 'normal' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'enable') = 'true' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'replicate') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('indexserver.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '10737418240' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_wait_on_buffer_full') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_max_retention_size') = '1048576' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'enable_log_retention') = 'on' WITH RECONFIGURE;

 

Parameters to be set on target database

we need to set below parameters on target database (execute commands in systemDB > sql editor)

 

ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('multidb', 'enforce_ssl_database_replication') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication_communication', 'enable_ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'ssl') = 'off' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('communication', 'listeninterface') = '.global' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_async_buffer_size') = '1073741824' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('system_replication', 'logshipping_timeout') = '30' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('persistence', 'log_mode') = 'normal' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'enable') = 'true' WITH RECONFIGURE;
ALTER SYSTEM ALTER CONFIGURATION ('global.ini', 'SYSTEM') SET ('inifile_checker', 'replicate') = 'false' WITH RECONFIGURE;

 

Note : If this parameter are not set already then after setting up parameter you need restart of HANA database. (Both source DB and target DB)

Additionally we can check if any additional HANA source is having using below command

SELECT * FROM M_PLUGIN_MANIFESTS;

we need to have same plugins on target database as well

Setting up tenant copy 

Below are the steps to be followed to start tenant copy 

  1. Login to target database on systemDB using SYSTEM user using HANA studio
  2. Open SQL editor and run below commands.
  3. Stop tenant database

 

ALTER SYSTEM STOP DATABASE <SID>;

 

Note : If DB SID which you are copying is having same SID name then we need to drop the existing tenant DB. If you want to copy to different SID then no need to drop the existing tenant DB in target

  • We had same SID name hence dropping the target tenant DB using below command

 

Drop database <SID>; ​

 

  • Create Credential for Authenticated Access to Source System

 

CREATE CREDENTIAL FOR COMPONENT 'DATABASE_REPLICATION' PURPOSE '<hostname of source db>:<Nameserver SQL port>' TYPE 'PASSWORD' USING 'user="SYSTEM";password="<password>"'

 

  • Starting copy

 

CREATE DATABASE <SID> AS REPLICA OF <Source DB SID>  AT '<Source DB hostname>:<30001>';

 

This will start your tenant copy from source to target

you can monitor the progress using below command

 

SELECT * FROM SYS_DATABASES.M_DATABASE_REPLICA_STATISTICS;

 

you might get error regarding authentication or replication status as unknown.

for that you can find the logs in target database " indexserver log file "

Performing takeover / Finalizing replication

Once entire database is copied you will see status as " Active "

Now we are ready for finalizing the database copy.

Use below command on target SystemDB to complete the copy.

Note : when you are doing database migration you need to rampdown the source system application first then perform the  FINALIZE REPLICA

 

Alter database PRD FINALIZE REPLICA;

 

Once you are done with this you can drop the source system credentials using below command

 

DROP CREDENTIAL FOR COMPONENT 'DATABASE_REPLICATION' PURPOSE 'Source DB hostname:30001' TYPE 'PASSWORD';

 

 you can revert the parameters that were set during tenant copy procedure.

By using this method we migrated the systems hosted on HANA database from one datacenter to other datacenter.

Below are some reference articles of SAP

Copy a Tenant Database to Another System 

SAP Note - 2472478

entry.title: Re: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content:
Hello @Kristian2 

Purpose of the app 'Monitor Purchase Order Items' has been clearly mentioned in the below documentation.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/82f1e2574096f432e10000000a441470.html 

I think there must a business reason associated for bringing IncoTerm field in above app. Request you to create your own report using the mentioned CDS views and other as per your requirement.

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP: Multi-layer Defense in Depth Architecture of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear @Jana_Cyber 

Really helpful blog. Could you help us with this questions:

Is the network of the customer further segmented? Are development, quality and production systems separated with their own VLANs and do these have firewalls in between? Is there a firewall between the ABAP application servers and their (HANA) database servers?

entry.title: Re: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the...
entry.content: Did you already try method SET_LOCATOR_ACTIVE_TAB of CL_BUPA_DIALOG_JOEL_OPTIONS ?

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 - Onboarding error messages are not triggering in Personal Data Collection step
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have a requirement to show validation messages on click on 'Submit' button in Personal Data Collection step to new hire in case there is no 'National ID' data / 'Emergency Contact' data entered in PDC step.

We have tried using the Validate HRIS Elements / Hire Rehire scenario business rule scenario(s) to generate error messages on the candidate page, but we have not achieved the desired outcome. 

SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 

@smitajalit @Gopinath @Kalai @ThomasBilbaugh 

Thank you!
Nandini M

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Assigning PO Master Form Temp...

Kindly follow the test cope 1LQ and its set-up instructions.

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: How to navigate directly to the commercial tab of the...
entry.content:
Hi Raymond,  

I assume you mean add the following line of code; lo_options-set_locator_active_tab( ‘X’ ).

I have tried entering different values in ‘X’, but it doesn't change the execution of my program. It still shows the BP transaction with the general data.

I still have the same problem, I don't know how to access the possible values that X can take.

entry.title: Re: Video Series - Part 10 - Testing CAP application through Postman
entry.content:
Hi Kinsbrunner,

I have below requirement from client, Could you please tell me that can we configure with the use of SDK? if yes then what steps i should follow in SDK?

  • In C4C they want separate WCV (work center view) page where sales emp. update all opportunities revenue details in each month's field. Whatever opportunities created by particular sales emp. they can see all the oppotunities in this new WCV page. He/she can update revenue details in each months field manual and download the report of all updated fields.
  • Revenue details need to be updated for each opportunity across for all 12 months.
  • Total 17+ Columns need to create for this development.
  • Currency wise report need to download withing the page.
  • Can they maintain or download old months/year report?
  • Timeline or Period option required for report download.

Can we configure above requirement with the use of SDK for C4C opportunity?

Thank you!!!

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

entry.title: Re: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload from a spreadsheet file into an SAP Fiori app in SAP BTP ABAP Environment Par
entry.content:
Hi @Sanjeevani ,

Looking into the images you posted, it seems there is nothing wrong. It will be helpful if you please share the error, you are receiving However, you may double-check the following points for your reference.

1. You should define the press action in the control configuration section of your manifest.json file as mentioned below.

2. You will get the application id at the very beginning of manifest.json file.

entry.title: Re: How to Connect CAPM With Integration Suite ?
entry.content: Have you checked my comment that there is no EDMX for a REST service?

entry.title: Service Orders/Quotations 'Notes' not available for Form Templates
entry.content:
Hello,

The customer needs to show the "Notes" of service order and service quotation in a form. We have created a custom field for that but they don't have a field with that information available.

Custom logic is created for the CRMS4_SERV_CUST_H_MODIFY and inside of that logic, we are reading CDS Views "serviceorderlongtext" and "srvcqtanlongtext" to get those texts.

However, we are having a problem: The texts are being saved on those CDS Views after the BAdI runs, so they can only get the previous saved entrance in those tables but not the final results.

Does anyone have the same problem?
How did you solve it?

Best regards,
Ines Martins

entry.title: SAP Service Cloud - Version 2 - Utilities add on - How to create a Premise
entry.content:
Hello all,

I want to create a premise via SAP Service cloud - Utilities Add on. When i go to Premise i don´t have the option to create a new premise.

Can i create a premise via Service cloud?

Thanks,

Rita

entry.title: Re: When uploading attachments through Fiori, the backend...
entry.content: Ask your SAP Basis Team to implement the Virus Scanner. Because when you allow content to be uploaded this content must be scanned for infections. Also you should scan the files before downloading as with updated virus definitions previously undetected infections can be found.

entry.title: SAP B1 Web client does not show print layout same as SAP Client
entry.content:
Dear SAP Export,

Now I am testing the Web Client (SAP 10.0 FP2111) and I found when I preview print report on Web Client. The layout list that shows on Web Client has less than SAP Client. I did not see the layout that I wanna preview in the layout list on Web Client. 

How do I make the layout list show on Web Client same as SAP Client?

Best regards,
Siripong

entry.title: standard list of scope items for the MM
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please let me know where I can find a standard list of scope items for the MM module, including various types of procurement documents and material type management? I am new to the MM module and am unsure where to start my studies. I have already reviewed scope items J45, 1XF, BNX, BMD, and BMK. Are there any other essential basics that I might have missed?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Automating Report Downloads with SAP Build Process Automation from DRC
entry.content: Great blog post, thanks @niladri11! 👍🏻

entry.title: "Master Your Universal ID: Join Our Expert Webcasts for Essential Tips and Solutions!"
entry.content:
Join the Customer Interaction Center (CIC) for an exclusive session where we'll guide you through setting up your Universal ID, linking your S-/P-user accounts, and managing your account effortlessly.

 Our expert team will offer valuable insights on resolving any issues or questions related to your UID, including how to delete your UID, unlink a user ID, manage email address changes, and more.

Additionally, we recognize that recent updates to certification processes on the SAP Training Portal and SAP Learning Hub may have raised some questions. We'll also provide guidance on these changes, ensuring you have all the information needed to navigate these updates with confidence.

Agenda:

  • How to create your UID
  • Linking accounts and email addresses
  • Maintaining your personal data and change the primary Universal ID email address
  • How to reset your UID password
  • How to request unlink/deletion of the UID.
  • SAP certifications:  How to add recovery email and transfer certificates

Check out the upcoming sessions at this link: https://events.sap.com/supportwebcasts/en/home or register below via the links provided:

 

Session

Date & Time

How to attend

 

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (English)

September 19

09:00 – 10:00 a.m. UTC+8

11:00 – 12:00 p.m. UTC+10 AEST

 

Register

 

Managing your SAP Universal ID (English)

September 19

10:30 – 11:30 a.m. EST

15:30 – 16:30 p.m. CET

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (English)

September 24

10:30 – 11:30 a.m. CET

15:00 – 16:00 p.m. IST

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (Chinese)

September 25

10:00 – 11:00 a.m. CST

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (Spanish)

October 09

09:00-10:00 a.m. COL

11:00-12:00 p.m. ART

16:00-17:00 p.m. CET

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (English)

October 16

09:00 – 10:00 a.m. EST

15:00 – 16:00 p.m. CET

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (Portuguese)

October 16

11:00 – 12:00 p.m. BRT

15:00 – 16:00 p.m. CET

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (Korean)

November 06

10:00 AM - 11:00 AM, UTC+9 Korea Time

 

Register

 

Universal ID Deep Dive (English)

November 13

09:00 – 10:00 a.m. EST

15:00 – 16:00 p.m. CET

 

Register

 

 

 

 


If you’re unable to attend the upcoming webcast, don’t worry! You can access the recordings here: https://events.sap.com/supportwebcasts/en/home.

Feel free to share this event with any colleagues who might be interested!

Thank you for your attention, and we look forward to seeing you at the webcasts!

Explore more #CustomerInteractionCenter blog posts here!

entry.title: Re: SAP DM / EWM Goods issue of Non BOM items (Single Order Staging)
entry.content:
Hi DaMa,

Non-BOM component consumption is currently not supported in EWM. You can refer to this note for more information: https://me.sap.com/notes/3379404

 

Best,

Isabelle

entry.title: Re: How to install more than one DP Agent on a machine (W...
entry.content: I installed the second DP agent using hdbinst.exe, as it couldn't be done through hdbsetup.exe.

entry.title: Migrate Java Mapping from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Posted as a blog. Will share the blog link here soon.

entry.title: SAP Crystal Reports - Issue with bold and can grow option
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I have an issue with bold and can grow option. Currently I have a field with a formula on Font\Style formula for Bold the field in some cases, also I have the can grow option checked.

The problem is when bold is applied, can grow is not applied and text applied clipped.

Equally, if I directly put this field bold as default, automatically the width is resized. That I think that is what happens when the formula applies the bold style.

I tried to insert a text field and put inside the field for apply Font\Style formula only to this field in this text box. But occurs the same problem.

Any idea how to solve it? Thanks in advance

SAP Crystal Reports

entry.title: BTP regions not supported for SAP Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Customer is trying to activate the SAP Signavio Process Insights on BTP portal. As checked on BTP portal, there is an existing subaccount created under GCP-India region.

However, the SAP Signavio Process Insights is not supported in any of the GCP datacenter as per documentation. Preparing an Account for SAP Signavio Process Insights | SAP Help Portal

Does this mean, customer need to create another subaccount ? if yes, which region should they choose and would it lead to any charge increase w.r.t BTP portal?

entry.title: how to set alert on hana cloud and notify it by email
entry.content:
Could you inform me how to setup alert on HANA Cloud and send notification by email?
I need a notification when a "Used Memory" has reached a certain amount .

I have been observing memory usage from HANA cockpit and I need to get a notificaton when the "Used Memory" has reached certain amount.

I found that there are several documentations to acheive it but they seemed little complicated.

Is there any solution which is simple as possible? (no need to use SQL and other resources that can cost extra)

Here are some conditions
- by setting those up, there must be no affection on the instances, database and other running sevices (they shouldn't be stopped)

- need to know tha cost by setting them up (hope there is no cost)
- which authority is required 

Feel free to ask questions if any.

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to set alert on hana cloud and notify it by email
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) provides a service for alert notifications. Please refer to the documentation below for setup instructions and additional information.
  • What is SAP Alert Notification Service for SAP BTP? | SAP Help Portal
  • Alerts, Notifications and System Metrics in SAP HANA Cloud | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: How to mark absence in successfactors lms
entry.content:
Hello,

My client would like to track users absences (user who was registered in the class but did not attend the class)  into Successfactors LMS.

I was thinking about adding "ABSENCE" completion status for the different item type (mainly courses). And then run the learning history report and find the users absents.

But I am not sure about this option because completion status means that a user has come to the end of a learning event. 

I was also thinking about adding an "absent status" in the registration status in the class. So the administrator at the end of the class can mark user absent with this status. If I choose this option, it is possible to have a report showing all the users absents in all classes of the year for example?

Thanks a lot for your help.

entry.title: Re: Optimized Story Experience – SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics -> Excel Export ("all&q
entry.content: Anyone knows if this has been fixed?

entry.title: Re: Can we migrate Java mappings from SAP PO to SAP Integration Suite
entry.content: Hello Mahesh,

entry.title: SAP BAS commit changing xs-security.json
entry.content:
Hello @ALL,

for some reason I'm not able to commit my changes to my repo. Getting the following error.

Weird is that the commit is doing something strange with my xs-security.json file (first line is filled with some node info incl. special chars and the entire file was modified)

Even if I delete it, it gets recreated...

Anybody an idea ?

entry.title: Possibility of setting the user status that the serial number acquires with the delivery
entry.content:
Dear Customer Influence Team,

following the case 724800/2024, we would like to suggest the possibility of assigning a certain user status to a serial number when it is included in a delivery. For some types of deliveries, for example, the EDEL status is not assigned, but we need to customise this setting because.

Currently, if we assign a serial number to a project delivery (created with the CNS0 transaction), it will not acquire EDEL status.

We therefore ask you to consider this possibility among future implementations, as in our opinion it would be very useful for business processes.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Can we migrate Java mappings from SAP PO to SAP Integ...
entry.content:
Hello Mahesh,

Will share the blog link soon.

best regards

Atakan

entry.title: Re: Call web URL in ABAP class (eclipse ADT)
entry.content:
Requirement :

 Check the use of URL in ABAP class in eclipse environment. 

steps :

Use any URL ( example :https://www.sap.com) in your ABAP class and execute it. After execution, the URL page is opened automatically in web browser. Don't need any data from that. Just open/call URL in web browser with the help of ABAP class. 

After the ABAP class execution, the URL page is opened in web browser (or) it is navigated to URL page . Work on possibilities related this.

Note : we must achieve this requirement in Class only.

Thanks
Sanjeevani

entry.title: ICMR workflow Adjustment and Closing & communication button (Group Reporting)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have 2 questions:

1. I face an issue regarding WS78500087 & WS78500027 workflow, the workflow is running well but I need to wait more less a day to get it into the inbox. I need solution for this, is there any set up step then it can be retrieved to the inbox immediately?

2. in ICMR there is a communication button, we can use notification or email. in this case I want to use email to inform the recipient regarding variance adjustment. I have configured and assigned email template to matching method, also I have set up manage teams and responsibilities as you can see below:

but there is an information "check not performed". I need your assistance how to solve this issue and what to do thus email communication can be sent to recipient.

Thanks a lot for your help

entry.title: RISE with SAP Managed Services: What It Means for IT
entry.content:
In today's rapidly evolving business landscape, organizations must adapt to new market dynamics and customer expectations to stay competitive. Therefore, many are transitioning to cloud solutions to enhance agility and resilience. However, IT teams working with on-prem ERP systems may not fully realize how their current workload will change in a cloud ERP model. 

RISE with SAP provides organizations with a pathway to becoming an agile, resilient, and future-ready organization by moving to an AI-enabled cloud ERP that is both managed and optimized by SAP. In this blog, we will delve into the benefits of managed services provided by RISE with SAP and what they mean for IT departments. 

 

Offload ERP Infrastructure Management 

Transitioning to a cloud ERP is a significant investment of time and resources for IT departments. Once the migration is complete, organizations unlock a new "team" of experts through SAP managing their ERP infrastructure. While the migration process demands effort upfront, the long-term benefits are transformative, shifting the IT workload dramatically. 

So, how does SAP alleviate the burden on IT teams and lighten their workload? 

SAP provides comprehensive managed cloud services by managing the full production stack, including application, security, operating system, and infrastructure. RISE with SAP offers a proven methodology and tools for smooth migration from on-premises to cloud ERP, facilitating digital transformation through best practices, streamlined business processes, and robust governance. This structured approach helps organizations reduce risks and costs of their cloud ERP journey. 

 

Image: Managed cloud services in RISE with SAP 

 

SAP managed services use a shared control model. In this setup, SAP handles technical services that do not directly affect business operations, such as security patches and kernel updates. And services that impact business functions, like ERP upgrades and feature pack updates, are initiated by the customer and carried out by SAP.  

With this arrangement, customers maintain control over key business decisions and customisation while benefiting from SAP’s expertise in managing technical aspects. 

 

Image: Shared control model for managed services in RISE with SAP 

 

The Key to Trustworthy Cloud ERP Management 

SAP has extensive experience managing over 120,000 systems. In terms of data management, SAP oversees 28,000 TiB or a staggering 28 PB of memory across the world, which represents one of the largest setups in the industry.  

One common question that customers have is: how simple is it for them to get in touch with their SAP experts? 

Engaging with SAP experts is streamlined through a centralized, self-service portal that enables users to create tickets, monitor the system’s health, and view early alert reports and technical environment data – which is called SAP for Me. Customers also have a 24/7 support desk hotline available for immediate assistance and expert resources throughout the customer journey, starting from the implementation phase. 

With decades of experience in ERP, SAP continues to be a trusted leader in offering reliable and secure solutions for businesses worldwide. In the past year alone, SAP has successfully processed over 80,000 service requests, achieving 100% on-time resolution for high-priority cases. This strong track record demonstrates SAP’s ability to maintain high system uptime and address service requests, giving our customers confidence that their ERP system is in good hands. 

 

The Security Advantages of RISE with SAP 

According to the Cyberwarfare in the C-Suite 2022 Report, cybersecurity has officially become the world's third-largest economy. This reality emphasizes how crucial cybersecurity is in our fast-paced digital world. As cybercriminals are now harnessing AI to craft increasingly sophisticated and stealthy malware, making the stakes higher than ever, organizations face an uphill battle in safeguarding their business systems. 

So, the question arises: How can IT departments trust data stored in the cloud compared to data stored on-premises within their facilities?  

RISE with SAP manages the security of the operating system, database, and technical layers of the S/4HANA Cloud application, ensuring the reliable availability of SAP business applications. Customers can benefit from continuous security oversight provided by SAP security experts, which includes regular updates and patching, centralized security configurations, and controls. This approach frees up IT teams from repetitive and time-consuming tasks, allowing them to focus on more strategic initiatives, provides peace of mind with a predictable cost of security ownership, and mitigates the SAP security skills shortage by leveraging SAP professionals, SAP solutions, and tools, and benefit from the experience of our ecosystem of partners. 

With this mode, IT teams can concentrate on their core business objectives while the technical details are handled behind the scenes by SAP. 

 

Image: What RISE with SAP Offers 

 

As the number of regulations continues to grow, it becomes challenging for organizations to maintain compliance across numerous functions and systems. The good news is, RISE with SAP compliance management ensures adherence to global and regional regulatory requirements with about 130 audits conducted annually. 

Research shows that the top strategic and operational reason to migrate to cloud ERP is better security and compliance. Within the RISE with SAP Framework, security services prioritize three main objectives. One of them is safeguarding SAP applications against cyberattacks with features like ransomware and malware management, threat detection, access controls, and vulnerability scanning. 

 

Image: Reasons for migrating to the cloud. IDC’s SAP Global Future of Trust & Security Survey, 2023 

 

In summary, here is how the managed services provided by RISE with SAP benefit IT teams: 

  • More focus on what matters: With SAP managing the technical operations, IT teams can spend more time on projects that really impact the business. 
  • Single point of contact: SAP manages the entire production stack, so there’s no need to juggle multiple contacts. 
  • Expert management: A dedicated team from SAP ensures that the S/HANA Cloud Private Edition runs reliably and securely. 
  • Guided transformation: SAP partners with customers to help them navigate their journey to the cloud and drive transformation. 

 

Image: IT benefits from RISE with SAP managed services 

 

Want to learn more? View this 30-minute webinar to learn how SAP helps you transition to and run a cloud ERP: “Rise into the Future: Managed Cloud Services and Security in RISE with SAP”

entry.title: After running CVI synchronization - popup to confirm changes shows on the BP transaction - F2225
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

we migrated some bank data to the BP with a certified external tool directly on the relevant DB tables (KNBK and LFBK) and when the CVI synchronisation job is run and the BP are synchronised on the BP bank details, it comes a pop-up when we run the BP transations, saying that the changes are not confirmed and must be confirmed in the FD08. Do you know what could be the issue here?

Lets say following scenario:

ECC:               

Customer:100 - with bank details in KNBK (partner bank type A001)

Suppler: 100 - with bank details in LFBK (partner bakn type B001)

In S4 after we did the migration in the DB tables of the BP generated (BP:100 in S4 with both customer and supplier role):

Before CVI synchronisation job:

BUT0BK had no bank details. Only the LFBK and the KNBK had the above ones.

After CVI synchronisation job:

BUT0BK has both bank details from the vendor and the customer (which is correct), but when we check in the LFBK and KNBK, this has overwritten the current ones. Meaning it has added on the KNBK also the partner bank type and the bank details of the vendor and the same with the LFBK. So it looks now like this:

BUT0BK:

  1. Bank details of vendor - B001 (partner bank type)
  2. Bank details of customer - A001 (partner bank type)

LFBK:

  1. Bank details of vendor - B001 (partner bank type)
  2. Bank details of customer - A001 (partner bank type)--- this one here is incorrect and was added after CVI synch job in S4.

KNBK:

  1. Bank details of vendor - B001 (partner bank type) --- this one here is incorrect and was added after CVI synch job in S4.
  2. Bank details of customer - A001 (partner bank type)

So now when we run the BP Transaction, it comes the following popup, that the change is not confirmed and needs to be confirmed in FD08. Do you have any suggestions what is happening here and how to get rid of this change request popup?

Thanks,

Regys

entry.title: Re: internal server error(500) after Deploying full stack cap project using mta on cloudFoundary
entry.content: @Dipnesh Do you see any errors in the approuter log? Try `cf logs Full_stack`.

entry.title: Re: Details understanding into BoM and Production order S...
entry.content:
Hi @nikunjmehta2290 ,

Production BOMs
A production BOM is required for all materials requirements planning (MRP) runs and standard production orders. The production BOM lists parent items (i.e., finished products) and child items (i.e., components that complement the parent items). During the production process, you can turn components into finished products.

Sales BOMs
A sales BOM is used for sales documents where the parent item is listed as a sales item, not an inventory item. When the parent is selected in the sales document, the children appear as sub-items. You can update parent or child item quantities, but you can’t delete children or add new children to the package in the sales document.

Assembly BOMs
An assembly BOM is like a sales BOM, as it represents a collection of individual items in a set with a specific price. Like the sales BOM, you manage the final product as a sales item, not an inventory item. Unlike the sales BOM, only the finished product appears in the sales document; the components don’t appear as sub-items on the sales order, but do appear on the order’s pick list.

Template BOMs
A template BOM has no real restrictions the parent and child can be any item. Template BOMs are usable in both production and sales documents, with the parent item displaying first and components listed below it. You can replace the components with other components, delete components from the BOM and sales document, and update quantities.

entry.title: Re: create and update sales order with API_SALES_ORDER_SR...
entry.content:
Thanks Sandra_Rossi for your response and time.

Sorry for the delayed response.

Below is the Error log .

Resource not found for the segment 'A_SalesOrderScheduleLine'.

I searched many note i found very few regarding $batch, i could not get any thread/note that explains how to get sales order number which is created by a post call of $batch and pass it to the next patch/post call in the same changeset of the batch call.

I could see content-id can be used for this but i could not get any sample how to update related entity.

also I could read some threads, content-id has some restriction in V2 ODATA. V4 has more capability. It will be nice if i can get some help here.

below is the payload for reference.

 

 

--batch
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset
--changeset
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
POST A_SalesOrder HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json
Content-ID: X10
{
"SalesOrderType": "ZOR1",
"SalesOrganization": "1281",
"DistributionChannel": "20",
"OrganizationDivision": "30",
"SoldToParty": "9000012",
"PurchaseOrderByCustomer":"ABCXYZ-12345678",
"RequestedDeliveryDate":"2024-09-04T00:00:00",
"ShippingCondition":"02",
"PurchaseOrderByShipToParty":"ABC43746213-801QO00000FHZVPYA5",
"to_Item": [
{
"SalesOrderItem": "00010",
"SalesOrderItemText":"MAT TEXT",
"Material": "ABCA045R753_2",
"RequestedQuantity": "12"
}
],
 "to_Partner": [
{
"Customer":"9000022",
"PartnerFunction":"SH"
}
]
}

--changeset
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
PATCH $X10/A_SalesOrderScheduleLine HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json
{
  "SalesOrderItem":"10",
  "ScheduleLine":"1",
  "RequestedDeliveryDate": "2024-09-18T00:00:00"
}
--changeset--

--batch--

entry.title: Re: How to mark absence in successfactors lms

You can have completions status as "COURSES_NOShow" with credit as NO. LMS admin needs to select this completion status for such users.

entry.content:

We are trying to connect to Azure Databricks DB from SAP Integration Suite(Cloud Integration).. Firstly is it feasible to connect to Azure Databricks DB from Cloud Integration using JDBC adapter.. if possible could you please let us know what are the prerequisites steps needed to achieve this? this is the link regarding drivers that needs to installed for Azure Databricks .. databricks DB driver link .. could you please guide us on the steps that needs to be followed on Cloud Integration(like JDBC driver etc.,) to get the drivers installed on Cloud Integration? also what are the questions that needs to be asked to Azure Databricks team like where that DB server is hosted., etc to establish the connection from Cloud Integration? Thanks!

Regards,

Ramu

entry.title: I want to make only certain rows editable in table control.
entry.content:
I have a table control in my custom abap program where I have 7 columns. I want to achieve the below layout for input/output disabled/enabled where green is input allowed and red is input disabled. I have searched google and sap community for solutions and tried out many but nothing seems to be working.

Based on column 7, I am trying to make the row editable/disabled. If it is true, then input disabled. If it is false then input enabled. And by default, a new row will have column 7 as false. I tried to put my code inside a module within the Loop itab with table control in my PBO, but that doesn't seem to be working. 

Please help with this. It is quite urgent.

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Re: Why FM HR_ECM_DELETE_INFOTYPE does not work?

Thank you so much!

entry.title: Issue with Dynamic Table Access for Copying MOLGA Content Between Tables
entry.content:
Hi @ALL,

I'm currently developing a report to copy MOLGA content from one MOLGA to another. I've implemented dynamic table access for this, but it's unable to retrieve the table data. I'll share the program below, and any assistance would be greatly appreciated.

 

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_tbl_list,
         tabname TYPE tabname,
       END OF ty_tbl_list.

DATA: lt_tables TYPE TABLE OF ty_tbl_list,
      ls_table  TYPE ty_tbl_list,
      lv_src_ctry TYPE land1 VALUE '06', " France
      lv_tgt_ctry TYPE land1 VALUE 'MA'. " Morocco.

FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lt_src_data> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
               <lt_tgt_data> TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
               <ls_data>     TYPE any,
               <fs_country>  TYPE any,
               <fs_table>    TYPE STANDARD TABLE.


START-OF-SELECTION.

  CLEAR lt_tables.
  CLEAR ls_table.

  " Manually populating the internal table
  ls_table-tabname = 'V_T52D1'.
  APPEND ls_table TO lt_tables.


  LOOP AT lt_tables INTO ls_table.
    PERFORM copy_tbl_content USING ls_table-tabname lv_src_ctry lv_tgt_ctry.
  ENDLOOP.

FORM copy_tbl_content USING pv_tabname TYPE tabname
                              pv_src_ctry TYPE land1
                              pv_tgt_ctry TYPE land1.


ASSIGN (pv_tabname) TO <fs_table>.
IF sy-subrc <> 0.
  WRITE: / 'Table', pv_tabname, 'not found'.
  RETURN.
ENDIF.


  " Select data from source country
  SELECT * FROM (pv_tabname) INTO TABLE <lt_src_data> WHERE country = pv_src_ctry.

  IF <lt_src_data> IS INITIAL.
    WRITE: / 'No data found in table', pv_tabname, 'for country', pv_src_ctry.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  " Loop through the selected data and prepare it for insertion
  LOOP AT <lt_src_data> ASSIGNING <ls_data>.

    " Dynamically assign the 'country' field within the structure
    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'COUNTRY' OF STRUCTURE <ls_data> TO <fs_country>.

    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      <fs_country> = pv_tgt_ctry.
      APPEND <ls_data> TO <lt_tgt_data>.
    ELSE.
      WRITE: / 'Field COUNTRY not found in table', pv_tabname.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

  ENDLOOP.

  " Insert data into target country
  MODIFY (pv_tabname) FROM TABLE <lt_tgt_data>.

  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    WRITE: / 'Data copied successfully to table', pv_tabname, 'for country', pv_tgt_ctry.
  ELSE.
    WRITE: / 'Failed to copy data to table', pv_tabname, 'for country', pv_tgt_ctry.
  ENDIF.
ENDFORM.

Can you please suggest us which option can be used to post recurring journal entry on daily basis instead of monthly or weekly.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We are using Quote 1.0.

Thanks in Advance

SAP CPQ

entry.title: Re: Add standard field to Fiori App F2358
entry.content:
Hi,

As far as I can tell, this is the only app that lest us create a list of orders at an item level.

And yes, it comes from an operational requirement. We have a 3PL that require us to provide this information when communicating with them.

And to be honest, I find it really strange that this is so inflexible that we cant make a simple list showing information that is readily available on the order.

Do we really have to tell our logistics department that we have to develop a custom app just because they want to see incoterm for a line item?

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Cheat Sheet: Amounts and Quantities in ABAP CDS
entry.content:
Hi @AndreaUS ,

I have a use case where I need to calculate AMOUNT / QUANTITY to get PER_UNIT_AMOUNT .

I am facing some CDS errors which I just posted in my post yesterday,

CDS VIEW ENTITY - CURR / QUAN calculated field gives activation error 

In your blog post, I saw the use of CalculatedIUnit, which is bit strange in my opinion, as we are still trying to get a Calculated AMOUNT (and not quantity), (Amount / Quantity -> gives Amount), so why we mandatorily need a separate unit reference? 

Moreover, if we have multiple calculated amounts, then for each Amount field calculation, I need a separate calculatedUnit (having the same or different value).

 I have a real use case to convert atleast 15 cost fields from KEPH table (say KST001...KST015 ) to get per unit cost for materials in business report. So with this approach, I need to create 15 'calculatedUnit' fields in the CDS having the same value (say EUR / KG).

This is not CLEAN ABAP in my opinion, and I am still looking for a better and simpler way of achieving this.

any suggestions? 

Regards,

Bharat Bajaj

entry.title: Custom field enabled not available in UI in app Post General Journal Entries
entry.content:
APP: Custom fields, enables Posting General Journal entries, but APP: Posting General journal entries, fields cannot be added


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Validation like committed qty not greather than avail...
entry.content:
Hi @nikunjmehta2290 ,

SELECT * FROM OWTQ T0
INNER JOIN WTQ1 T1 ON T0."DocEntry" = T1."DocEntry"
LEFT JOIN OITW T2 ON T1."ItemCode" = T2."ItemCode" WHERE T2."IsCommited" < T2."OnHand"

entry.title: Re: Custom field enabled not available in UI in app Post...
entry.content:
See help.sap.com documentation on App Extensibility: Post General Journal Entries 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/e5defe0a850948d1bd7a2834739745c6.html?locale=en-US

"Key users can extend the app in the Custom Fields and Logic app using the business context Coding Block.

You can add fields to the following UI elements using UI adaptation at runtime:

note 2453614 - FAQ: Universal Journal Extensibility

outlines that Coding Block extension in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is Available in Fiori Reuse UI for many transactions that post journal entries, 

It is not used for customer or supplier line items (account type D or K in ACDOCA table), but derivation is possible with FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION enhancement option.

In relation to S/4HANA key user extensibility using Custom Fields and Custom Logic apps and Journal Entry Item business context

Field values cannot be entered manually, but display is possible in Manage Journal Entries Fiori app, 


See also kbas
2642121 - Custom Field for Journal not available in Journal Entry app

3448139 - Manage Journal Entries Extensibility

 3491508 How to add the custom fields in payload for Journal Entry API - SAP HANA Cloud?

entry.title: Re: Usage of PRT to balance Maximum number of Molds in SA...
entry.content:
Hi Paulo, 

>3 years old, but maybe worth a try: 

We ran into a comparable restriction in  a project and also thought about the PRTs.
Is that how you solved it after all? 

Best regards, Dennis

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5: How can i add a different css class to each F...
entry.content:
Hi, 

I know this is too late for your project, but this could help someone else facing similar issue.

Solution : you can add customData aggregation to FeedListItem. This will add new attribute called data-*  (in below case it would be data-color=<dynmic value from 'class' property binding) li tag of the rendered HTML. 

There could me more than one such lists in your entire project so it is better to apply CSS with a custom class or specific Id to the List. I have used custom class called "customList" and added it to List.

<mvc:View xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core">
<FeedInput
    post="onPost"
    icon="test-resources/sap/m/images/dronning_victoria.jpg"
    />

<List
    showSeparators="Inner"
    items="{/EntryCollection}" class="customList">
    <FeedListItem
        sender="{Author}"
        icon="{AuthorPicUrl}"
        senderPress="onSenderPress"
        iconPress="onIconPress"
        iconDensityAware="false"
        info="{Type}"
        timestamp="{Date}"
        text="{Text}" >
        <customData>
            <core:CustomData key="color" value="{class}" writeToDom="true"/>
        <customData>
    </FeedListItem>
</List>
</mvc:View>

Once above XML view gets rendered to DOM, It would contain.. 

<div class="customList .. and other standard classes">

   <ul>
      <li data-color="green">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      <li data-color="red">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      <li data-color="blue">
         <div> ... </div>
      </li>
      ... and so on
   </ul>
</div>

you can apply different style based on value of data-color attribute as below.

.customList li[data-color="green"]{
background-color : green;
}

.customList li[data-color="red"]{
background-color : red;
}

 let me know if this helps.

entry.title: How to extend Supplier Registration Invitation link in SLP
entry.content: I would like to setup the invitation for Supplier Registration and therefore configure the link expiration up to 30 days. WHere I can find this setup?

entry.title: Re: How to create a posting area in FS-CD?
entry.content:
Hi,

please refer to notes 1469987 - FQC0: Customer-specific posting areas - SAP for Me and 520127 - FI-CA consulting note: Account determination and posting areas - SAP for Me

Kind Regards,

Tobias

entry.title: Re: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024
entry.content: Looking forward for SAP Business AI - 2nd edition and 3rd sitblr 2024 !

entry.title: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module?
entry.content: Which Joule functions will be available for Customers who don't have Employee Central module? I couldn't find any clear functionality list matched with modules in use. Can somebody help?

entry.title: BUPT further checks - get current address data into PAI function module
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to implement check on entry (user action) in transaction BP, field Country (in section address) 
I used bdt Analyzer and found this 

Using BUPT transaction it is easy to implement further checks on PAI

Within that function module I am unable to find current address data.
I've tried using all methods I could find (for example cvi_bdt_adapter=>get_current_bp_data)

But I am still unable to find current address data.

Any ideas as to how to proceed?

entry.title: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
I'm working on reading data from an Excel file, but due to customer restrictions, I'm unable to use third-party libraries. My approach is to upload the Excel file to the backend, process the content there, and then send the data back to the frontend.

I am using UploadSet for the file upload, and while the upload process claims to be successful, the corresponding table in the backend is not being populated. I also tried using unmanaged save with RAP, but the code doesn't seem to be triggered when I attempt to upload the file.

Doe anyone know how to handle this scenario or what I am doing wrong?

Sample Codes:

UploadSet:

 

<upload:UploadSet
  id="idAttach"
  instantUpload="false"
  uploadEnabled="true"                         
  uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/SERVICE/InvoiceAttachSet"
  mode="None">
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Upload JS:

 

onUploadBtn: function(){
  var oAttachmentUpl = that.getView().byId("idAttach"); 
  var aIncompleteItems = oAttachmentUpl.getIncompleteItems();
  var iIncompleteItems = aIncompleteItems.length;

  for(var i = 0; i < iIncompleteItems; i++){
    var sFileName =  aIncompleteItems[i].getProperty("fileName");
    var oXCSRFToken = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "X-CSRF-Token",
      text: that.getOwnerComponent().getModel("SERVICE").getSecurityToken()
    });
    var oSlug = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "SLUG",
      text: sEingangnr + "/" + sFileName
    });
                
  oAttachmentUpl.addHeaderField(oXCSRFToken).addHeaderField(oSlug);
  oAttachmentUpl.uploadItem(aIncompleteItems[i]);
  oAttachmentUpl.removeAllHeaderFields();
  } 
}

 

RAP Behavior Definition:

 

managed implementation in class xxx unique;
strict ( 2) );

define behavior for xxx alias Excelupload
with unmanaged save
lock master

authorization master ( instance )
{
 create;
 update;
 field (readonly) Equnr;
}

entry.title: Re: SAML2 service not accessibleWhat has happened?Calling...
entry.content: The System working on many computer normally except my laptop it gaves this error message

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS commit changing xs-security.json
entry.content:
Found the reason ... 

A git pre-commit hook is executing 

exec basctl --command cicd.showLCAPManifest --param $PWD

This is corrupting the file...

entry.title: Re: solr admin page connection refused after upgrading to...
entry.content: hi @geffchang yes, it still responds ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED, maybe this could be a firewall issue? the server is started via WSL and Chrome is accessing it via windows

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content:
@ulrich_mhrke 

Below is the code of PAI of ZPROG1 (Screen 400)

 

MODULE user_command_0400 INPUT.
 CASE sy-ucomm.
    WHEN 'NEWMAT'.
      "test run
      SET PARAMETER ID 'OPTION' FIELD 'MAT'.
      CALL TRANSACTION 'ZTRANS'.

 

This code is calling selection screen of ZTRANS transaction.

 

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-001.
PARAMETERS : cust  RADIOBUTTON GROUP g1 DEFAULT 'X'  USER-COMMAND cmd  MODIF ID upd,

 

and some more parameters at selection screen.
Once selection screen is executed it is calling ALV grid using REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY function. Once grid is displayed and back is pressed then it again comes back to selection screen of ZTRANS. From here, if we press back, then it exits the transaction and not going back to screen 400 of ZPROG1.
We have tried to use AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON EXIT-COMMAND. Also under ZTRANS program and in that we tried to use SET SCREEN 0 or CALL TRANSACTION (of 400 screen) but it's not going back to screen 400.

About your second question, attribute of screen 400 (next screen) is set to 400 and it is not empty.
